shell.title: AI assistant
shell.description: Work from the current task context first, then help clarify, advance, and shape the next step.

list.description: This thread remembers the current task context and your collaboration history.

messages.empty: Tell AI what you want to move forward, and it will respond from the current task context.

composer.placeholder: For example: help me map the next step for this issue and point out the missing context.

approval.readStatusFailed: We could not read the approval status right now.
approval.confirmUnavailable: This action cannot be confirmed right now.
approval.actionIncomplete: The action did not finish successfully.
approval.confirmSuccess: Confirmed. AI is continuing the run.
approval.rejectUnavailable: This action cannot be rejected right now.
approval.batchSummary: This approval will execute {count} actions together.

codingPrompt.copied: The coding handoff prompt was copied.
codingPrompt.title: Coding handoff prompt
codingPrompt.unbound: Not linked to a specific issue

page.sendFailed: Failed to send the AI message.
page.emptyWorkspace: No workspace is available yet, so Intelligence cannot start.

sidebar.freeEmpty: There is no free-form conversation history yet. You can start directly from the current context.
sidebar.projectEmpty: There are no issue chat records for this project yet. Click the project itself to enter the project conversation.
sidebar.projectStart: Start the main conversation for this project
sidebar.empty: There is no conversation history yet. Send the first message and the composer will move down into the workspace.

chat.heroTitle: Start by saying what you want to move forward.
chat.selectionHint: Right-click messages to keep multi-select going. Later this can naturally grow into clipping, summarizing, or saving.

composer.placeholder: Keep typing your idea, blocker, or next action...
